preview_text: Take a look at what's new — we think you'll find something worth coming back for.
headline: Good to see you again.
body_copy:
It's been a little while, but we've been busy. New collections have landed since your last visit — and a few of them might be exactly what you've been looking for.

No pressure, no pitch. Come take a look.
hero_alt: New spring arrivals — a curated selection of our latest collection

preview_text: Your exclusive 15% discount is waiting — no code needed, applied at checkout.
headline: Welcome back. Here's 15% off.
body_copy:
We'd like to make your return worth it.

As one of our past customers, you're getting an exclusive 15% off your next order — not available to the general list. New arrivals, fan favourites, anything you like.

Your discount is already applied and expires on 12 May 2026.
hero_alt: Exclusive 15% off welcome-back offer for returning customers

headline: This is your last chance.
body_copy:
Your exclusive 15% discount expires tonight at 11:59 pm PT. After that, it's gone — and this offer won't be resent.

If there's something you've been thinking about, now is the time. One order, 15% off, no code needed.
